title: The Deputation of the Bann 'Amin b. $a'^a'ah
description: Ibn Humayd-Salamah-Ibn Isliaq-'A$im b. 'Umar b. Qatidah: The deputation of the Banu 'Amir came to the Messenger of God, and among them were 'Amir b. al-Tufayl, Arbad b. Qays b. Malik699 b. Ja'far, and Jabbar b. Sulma7OO b. Malik b. Ja'far. These three were the chiefs and mischief-makers [shayafin) of the tribe. 'Amir b. al-Tufayl701 came to the Messenger of God intending to 696. Yagnt, Mu'jam, IV, 237. 697. Ibn Isfiaq, Sarah, N, 264-65, cites a poem of Abu Ji'al.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
